description: Send customer testimonials and summary notes from calls. These should be structured and include insights from the calls.
Send search terms and landing pages from recent paid ads campaigns (last 3 months). This should include the search terms that are converting well and any associated landing pages.

Prepare and send 3 content calibration articles matching preferred tone/voice. These articles should be similar in topic to the content discussed in the meeting, but with a style and voice that aligns with Attention's existing content.
Send follow-up email with action items for all parties. This email should clearly outline the next steps and responsibilities for each participant.
Prepare and send AI-related content ideas for review. These ideas should be relevant to Attention's target audience and focus on the intersection of AI and sales.
Send versions of calibration articles for tone/voice/structure preferences.  This will allow Stewart to assess the style and content of the calibration articles and provide feedback.
